svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Monorepo Structure" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-654" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="660" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="root" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#f7f7f7;fontSize=14;" value="hydrate/ — pnpm workspaces + Turborepo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="1180" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cfg" parent="root" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#eeeeee;strokeColor=#999999;spacing=8;fontSize=12;" value="Root config: package.json · pnpm-workspace.yaml · turbo.json · tsconfig.base.json · .npmrc · .env.example" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1140" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apps" parent="root" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#eefbe9;" value="apps/ — installable clients" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="560" x="20" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_web" parent="apps" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="web/ Next.js 15 + shadcn
app/ (RSC, server actions, manifest)
components/ui (shadcn, web-only)
lib/supabase (@supabase/ssr) · lib/notifications" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="520" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_mob" parent="apps" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="mobile/ Expo / RN + NativeWind
app/ (Expo Router screens)
lib/supabase (expo-secure-store)
lib/notifications (rolling-window scheduler) · metro.config.js" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="20" y="154" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_desk" parent="apps" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="desktop/ Tauri v2 (no own UI)
src-tauri/ (notification, tray, autostart,
single-instance, deep-link, secure store)
tauri.conf.json → frontendDist = ../../web/out" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="20" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkgs" parent="root" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#fff9e6;" value="packages/ — shared libraries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="560" x="600" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_shared" parent="pkgs" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;spacing=6;fontSize=12;" value="shared/ @hydrate/shared (source-only; apps transpile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="520" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_sch" parent="pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="src/schemas/ Zod: profiles · intake_entries · reminder_settings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="520" x="20" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_logic" parent="pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="src/logic/ goal/progress/streak · day-bucketing · ml↔oz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="520" x="20" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_rem" parent="pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="src/reminders/ computeFireTimes + diff + re-arm orchestrator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="520" x="20" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_sb" parent="pkgs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="supabase/ typed client factory + generated types.ts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="520" x="20" y="224" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sbdir" parent="root" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#888888;swimlaneFillColor=#f3eefb;" value="supabase/ — tracked migrations (applied to the HOSTED project via plugin)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="560" x="600" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sb_mig" parent="sbdir" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="migrations/ profiles · intake_entries · reminder_settings
RLS policies · signup trigger · tz-change trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="520" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sb_cfg" parent="sbdir" style="text;html=1;align=left;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;spacing=6;fontSize=12;" value="Hosted dev + prod projects — no local stack;
managed via Supabase plugin (apply_migration / gen types)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="520" x="20" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
